### Minecraft 26.3 Snapshot 4 Summary
* Minecraft now uses SDL3 instead of GLFW for window management and input, with UI changes including removing raw mouse input and making borderless fullscreen the default.
* Added new data components for custom furnace fuels (`cooking_fuel`), brewing fuels (`brewing_fuel`), and sign text, along with technical updates to data pack and resource pack versions.
* Spectator mode players can now use portals, and armadillos won't try to roll up in liquids.
* Several data pack and environment attribute changes have been made, including new natural mob spawn controls.

### Minecraft 26.3 快照4 摘要
* Minecraft 现在使用 SDL3 替代 GLFW 进行窗口管理和输入，并调整了 UI，例如移除了原始输入鼠标设置并将无边框全屏设为默认模式。
* 新增了用于自定义熔炉燃料 (`cooking_fuel`)、酿造燃料 (`brewing_fuel`) 和告示牌文本的数据组件，并更新了数据包和资源包版本。
* 旁观模式玩家现在可以使用传送门，犰狳在浸入液体时将不再尝试卷曲。
* 进行了多项数据包和环境属性更改，包括新增对自然生物生成的控制。

**[Read Original / 阅读原文](https://www.minecraft.net/en-us/article/minecraft-26-3-snapshot-4)**

### Canadian Wildfires Cause Severe Pollution in North American Cities
*   Wildfires in Canada have made Toronto, New York, and Washington top the list of the most polluted cities in the region.
*   Canadian officials report that fire activity in Ontario is beginning to ease, which is expected to lead to improved air quality in affected U.S. cities.

### 加拿大野火导致北美城市严重污染
*   加拿大的野火使得多伦多、纽约和华盛顿成为该地区污染最严重的城市。
*   加拿大官员报告称，安大略省的火势活动开始减弱，预计这将改善受影响的美国城市的空气质量。

## 🔥 GitHub Trending / GitHub 热门项目

### code-review-graph - Local-first code intelligence graph for AI-assisted code reviews
* **What it does**: It builds a persistent structural map of your codebase using Tree-sitter ASTs. This map provides AI coding tools (via MCP or CLI) with only the precise context needed for a code review, dramatically reducing the number of tokens processed.
* **Key features**:
    * **Blast-Radius Analysis**: Traces the impact of changes to compute a minimal, relevant review set.
    * **Incremental Updates**: Keeps the graph current with sub-2-second updates on file changes.
    * **Monorepo Support**: Efficiently handles large repositories by excluding irrelevant files.
    * **Broad Language & Platform Coverage**: Supports 40+ languages and auto-configures for 15+ AI coding platforms (e.g., Cursor, Copilot, Claude Code).
    * **Custom Language Definitions**: Users can add new languages via a config file without forking the project.
* **Why it's notable**: It addresses a major inefficiency in AI-assisted development by reportedly achieving **38x to 528x token reductions** in real-world scenarios. Its ability to significantly cut costs and improve review accuracy for large codebases makes it a highly practical tool, driving its current trend in popularity.

### code-review-graph - 面向AI辅助代码审查的本地代码智能图谱
* **功能介绍**：使用Tree-sitter AST为你的代码库构建一个持久化的结构图谱。它通过MCP或CLI为AI编码工具提供完成代码审查所必需的精确上下文，从而大幅减少处理的令牌数量。
* **主要特点**：
    * **影响范围分析**：追踪变更的影响，计算出最小的相关审查集。
    * **增量更新**：通过文件变更时低于2秒的更新保持图谱最新。
    * **Monorepo支持**：通过排除无关文件高效处理大型代码仓库。
    * **广泛的语言和平台覆盖**：支持40多种语言，并可为15+种AI编码平台（如Cursor、Copilot、Claude Code）自动配置。
    * **自定义语言定义**：用户可通过配置文件添加新语言，无需分叉项目。
*   **为何值得关注**：它解决了AI辅助开发中的一个主要效率瓶颈。据报告，在真实场景中可实现**38倍到528倍的令牌减少**。它能显著降低大型代码库的成本并提高审查准确性，使其成为一款高度实用的工具，这驱动了其当前的流行趋势。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/tirth8205/code-review-graph)**

### KTransformers - Flexible Framework for Heterogeneous LLM Inference & Fine-tuning
*   **What it does**: A framework designed to optimize large language model (LLM) inference and fine-tuning by leveraging CPU-GPU heterogeneous computing. It focuses on achieving high performance and efficiency, especially for massive Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models.
*   **Key features**:
    *   **AMX/AVX Acceleration**: Optimized kernels for Intel AMX and AVX512/AVX2, supporting INT4/INT8 quantized inference.
    *   **MoE Optimization**: Efficient inference for Mixture-of-Experts models with NUMA-aware memory management.
    *   **Quantization Support**: Supports CPU-side INT4/INT8 and GPU-side GPTQ quantized weights.
    *   **Easy Integration**: Provides a clean Python API, with existing integrations into serving frameworks like SGLang.
    *   **Ultra-Large Model SFT**: Integrates with LLaMA-Factory for fine-tuning gigantic MoE models (e.g., DeepSeek-V3/R1) on limited GPU memory, outperforming standard ZeRO-Offload.
*   **Why it's notable**: It demonstrates significant performance improvements (up to 3-28x speedup) for state-of-the-art models like DeepSeek-V3/R1 on consumer or modest hardware. The project provides "Day 0" support for many new models (GLM-5, Kimi-K2, MiniMax-M3), offers a practical path for both inference serving and fine-tuning on resource-constrained setups, and has gained rapid community attention (328 stars in one day).

### KTransformers - 用于异构大模型推理与微调的灵活框架
*   **功能介绍**: 一个通过CPU-GPU异构计算来优化大语言模型（LLM）推理和微调的框架，专注于在消费级或有限硬件上实现高效、高性能的模型运行，特别针对大规模混合专家模型（MoE）。
*   **主要特点**:
    *   **AMX/AVX加速**：为Intel AMX和AVX512/AVX2优化的内核，支持INT4/INT8量化推理。
    *   **MoE优化**：针对混合专家模型的高效推理，具备NUMA感知的内存管理。
    *   **量化支持**：支持CPU端的INT4/INT8和GPU端的GPTQ量化权重。
    *   **易于集成**：提供简洁的Python API，并已与SGLang等推理框架集成。
    *   **超大模型微调**：与LLaMA-Factory集成，可在有限GPU内存下对DeepSeek-V3/R1等超大MoE模型进行微调，速度优于标准ZeRO-Offload方案。
*   **为何值得关注**: 项目在主流硬件上展示了对DeepSeek-V3/R1等前沿模型的显著性能提升（高达3-28倍加速）。它能为多个新发布模型提供“首日”支持，并为在资源受限环境中进行模型推理和微调提供了切实可行的方案，近期在社区中获得了极高的关注度（单日获得328星）。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/kvcache-ai/ktransformers)**

### rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch - Comprehensive, hands-on AI engineering curriculum
*   **What it does**: A complete, end-to-end educational curriculum designed to teach AI engineering from the ground up. It spans 20 phases and 503 lessons (~320 hours), covering everything from linear algebra and foundational math to building LLMs, agents, and autonomous systems. The core philosophy is "Learn it. Build it. Ship it," where each lesson produces a reusable artifact.
*   **Key features**: 1) Structured 20-phase curriculum moving from math foundations to production. 2) Every algorithm is built from scratch first (backprop, attention, tokenizer) before using frameworks like PyTorch. 3) Multi-language support (Python, TypeScript, Rust, Julia). 4) Each lesson concludes with a shippable tool: a prompt, a skill, an agent, or an MCP server. 5) Includes built-in AI agent skills (`/find-your-level`, `/check-understanding`) for personalized learning.
*   **Why it's notable**: It addresses a major gap in AI education by providing a cohesive, practical roadmap that prioritizes deep understanding over superficial API calls. The massive engagement (150k+ readers, 240k+ pageviews/month) and its #1 trending status highlight the demand for this structured, "build-it-yourself" approach. The project is free, open-source (MIT), and designed to create a portfolio of artifacts you genuinely understand because you built them.

### rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch - 全面、实践导向的AI工程课程体系
*   **功能介绍**：一个从头开始教授AI工程的完整教育课程体系。涵盖20个阶段、503节课（约320小时），内容从线性代数和基础数学一直延伸到构建大语言模型、智能体和自主系统。其核心理念是“学习、构建、交付”，每一课都会产出一个可重用的工具或产物。
*   **主要特点**：1) 结构化的20阶段课程，从数学基础进阶到生产实践。2) 所有算法首先从零实现（反向传播、注意力机制、分词器），再使用PyTorch等框架。3) 支持多种编程语言（Python、TypeScript、Rust、Julia）。4) 每节课都产出一个可交付成果：一个提示词、一项技能、一个智能体或一个MCP服务器。5) 内置AI智能体技能（如`/find-your-level`、`/check-understanding`）以实现个性化学习。
*   **为何值得关注**：它通过提供一个连贯、实践性强的学习路线图，直击当前AI教育碎片化的痛点，强调深度理解而非简单的API调用。项目的极高人气（15万+读者，月页面浏览量24万+）及其热门趋势，表明了这种“从零构建”的结构化学习方法的巨大需求。该项目是免费、开源的（MIT协议），旨在为你创造一个你真正理解、因为亲手构建而获得的“作品集”。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch)**


## 🚀 Fast-Moving Repos / 快速崛起项目

### Grok Build - SpaceXAI's Terminal AI Coding Agent
* **What it does:** A full-screen, mouse-interactive terminal-based (TUI) AI coding agent. It can understand your codebase, edit files, execute shell commands, search the web, and manage long-running tasks.
* **Key features:** Supports interactive, headless (for scripting/CI), and embedded (via the Agent Client Protocol - ACP) modes. It is built in Rust for performance and offers extensive documentation and theming.
* **Why it's notable:** Developed by SpaceXAI, it represents a sophisticated, high-performance tool for AI-assisted development with a rich feature set, including a modern TUI and deep system integration. Its trending status is evidenced by its nearly 20k stars.

### Grok Build - SpaceXAI 终端 AI 编程代理
* **功能介绍：** 一款全屏、支持鼠标交互的终端用户界面（TUI）AI 编程代理。它能理解你的代码库、编辑文件、执行 shell 命令、搜索网页并管理长时间运行的任务。
* **主要特点：** 支持交互模式、无头模式（用于脚本/CI）和嵌入模式（通过代理客户端协议 - ACP）。基于 Rust 构建以获得高性能，并提供丰富的文档和主题定制。
* **为何值得关注：** 由 SpaceXAI 开发，它代表了一个功能强大、高性能的 AI 辅助开发工具，具有丰富的功能，包括现代的 TUI 和深度的系统集成。其获得近两万星标也证明了它的热度。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/xai-org/grok-build)**

### Codex Dream Skin - A Theming & Skin Tool for the Codex Desktop App
*   **What it does**: This tool customizes the visual appearance of the official OpenAI Codex desktop application. It injects custom themes using a local Chrome DevTools Protocol (CDP) connection, changing backgrounds and UI accents without altering the official application files or binaries.
*   **Key features**:
    *   **Native UI Interaction**: Changes are applied to the actual interactive UI elements (sidebar, cards, input fields), not just a static screenshot overlay.
    *   **True Background Layer**: Applies a seamless 16:9 wallpaper across the entire app window, enhancing the atmosphere on the home screen while minimizing distractions on task pages.
    *   **Theme Management**: Provides menu bar (macOS) and system tray (Windows) controls to save, switch between, and restore multiple themes, including pre-set designs.
    *   **Safe & Non-Invasive**: Uses a local CDP loopback connection only. It does not modify the official app installation, code signing, or automatically rewrite API configurations.
*   **Why it's notable**: It offers a safe and flexible way to personalize the Codex development environment, blending aesthetics with functionality. Its popularity (over 10k stars) highlights a strong community demand for tool customization and a more atmospheric coding workspace.

### Codex Dream Skin - Codex 桌面客户端换肤/主题工具
*   **功能介绍**: 这是一个用于定制 OpenAI Codex 桌面客户端视觉外观的工具。它通过本地 CDP 注入方式为应用更换主题和背景，无需修改官方安装包或应用程序文件。
*   **主要特点**:
    *   **真正的UI交互**: 修改作用于实际的交互控件（如侧栏、建议卡、输入框），而非静态截图贴图。
    *   **真实背景层**: 一张 16:9 的壁纸会无缝铺满整个应用窗口，在首页营造氛围，在任务页则自动降低干扰。
    *   **主题管理**: 提供 macOS 菜单栏和 Windows 系统托盘，支持保存、一键切换和还原多个本地主题，包含多款精选预设。
    *   **安全且无侵入**: 仅通过本地回环 CDP 注入，不修改官方应用目录、代码签名，也不会自动改写你的 API Key 等配置。
*   **为何值得关注**: 它为开发者提供了一种安全、灵活的方式来个性化自己的 Codex 工作环境，将美学与功能性相结合。项目的高人气（超过一万星）反映了社区对开发工具定制化和更具氛围感的编码体验的强烈需求。

**[View Repository / 查看仓库](https://github.com/Fei-Away/Codex-Dream-Skin)**
